Telemarketing Cold Call Script for User’s Choice
(Ends With a Call-back to Decision Maker)
Receptionist: Hello, ____________ Construction. Can I help you? (If the receptionist
says his or her name, then repeat it after you say, “Hi” in the following response.)
BD Agent: Hi, my name is ________________, and I’m a state compliance advisor for a
registered training organization called (your companies name). Who’s the right person to
speak about employee training and development? Would that be the head of your HR
department or is it someone else?
Receptionist: What’s this in regards to?
BD Agent: It’s in regards to state funding that’s become available to up-skill your
employees. Who’s the right person to speak to about that? Would that be the head of your
HR department or is it someone else?
Receptionist: That would be ________________, from HR.
BD Agent: Okay, great. Can I speak to him, please?
Receptionist: He’s out of the office right now. Can I take a message?
BD Agent: Do you have any idea when he’ll be back?
Receptionist: Not until tomorrow.
BD Agent: Okay, no problem. Do you happen to have his cell number handy?
Receptionist: I don’t, but, again, I can take a message if you’d like, and have him call
you back.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

BD Agent: That’s okay. I’ll just give him a call back tomorrow. What’s the best time to
reach him?
Receptionist: He’s usually in in the morning.
BD Agent: Okay, great. I’ll call back then. And your name again is …?
Receptionist: It’s ___________.
BD Agent: Okay, thanks, _____________. I’ll give ___________ a call back tomorrow
morning. Somewhere between nine and ten sound good?
Receptionist: Yes.
BD Agent: Okay, great. Thanks for your time.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 2 --
